title: File picker dialog can be shown over on different tab when focused on it (on split view)
bounty_rationale: mitigated low impact ui spoofing requiring multiple complex gestures
description_snippet:
VULNERABILITY DETAILS

the vulnerability is similar as https://issues.chromium.org/issues/40063021 but this bug occurs when the tab focus changes to the neighboring tab (happens in split view)


VERSION
Version 142.0.7409.0 (Official Build) canary (64-bit)
Operating System: Windows 11

REPRODUCTION
